articles.title_en: FSB says ship arriving at Russian port from Belgium was found to have sea mines attached to its hull
articles.lead_en: Russia’s Federal Security Service said magnetic mines were found on the hull of the gas tanker Arrhenius after the vessel arrived at the Russian port of Ust-Luga in the Leningrad region from Antwerp.
articles.title_raw: FSB says ship arriving at Russian port from Belgium was found to have sea mines attached to its hull
articles.lead_raw: Russia’s Federal Security Service said magnetic mines were found on the hull of the gas tanker Arrhenius after the vessel arrived at the Russian port of Ust-Luga in the Leningrad region from Antwerp.

articles.title_en: Kazakhstan will not enforce ruling allowing Ukraine’s Naftogaz to collect $1.4 billion from Russia’s Gazprom, Justice Minister says
articles.lead_en: Kazakhstan will not enforce a ruling by the Astana International Financial Centre court that recognized Ukraine’s Naftogaz’s right to collect $1.4 billion from Russia’s Gazprom, Justice Minister Yerlan Sarsenbaev said.
articles.title_raw: Kazakhstan will not enforce ruling allowing Ukraine’s Naftogaz to collect $1.4 billion from Russia’s Gazprom, Justice Minister says
articles.lead_raw: Kazakhstan will not enforce a ruling by the Astana International Financial Centre court that recognized Ukraine’s Naftogaz’s right to collect $1.4 billion from Russia’s Gazprom, Justice Minister Yerlan Sarsenbaev said.

articles.title_en: Russian security services thwart terrorist attack aboard ship arriving from Belgium — FSB
articles.lead_en: The Arrhenius gas carrier was supposed to to be loaded and then head to the Turkish port of Samsun

articles.title_en: TASS: near Kharkov, Ukrainian guardianship kidnapped three children of the Ukrainian Armed Forces
articles.lead_en: The soldier is sure that his sons and daughter were taken “for experiments,” Russian law enforcement agencies said
articles.title_raw: ТАСС: под Харьковом украинская опека похитила троих детей военного ВСУ
articles.lead_raw: Солдат уверен, что его сыновей и дочь забрали "на опыты", рассказали в российских силовых структурах

articles.title_en: Wagenknecht: German industry needs energy from Russia
articles.lead_en: The founder of the BSW party believes that it is necessary to purchase oil and gas “where the supply is cheapest”

articles.title_en: Peskov called Britain's lifting of part of the sanctions on fuel from Russian oil pragmatism
articles.lead_en: Such situations, when they concern interpersonal communication, are called cynicism, the Kremlin representative noted
articles.title_raw: Песков назвал прагматизмом отмену Британией части санкций на топливо из нефти РФ
articles.lead_raw: Подобные ситуации, когда они касаются межчеловеческого общения, называются цинизмом, отметил представитель Кремля

articles.title_en: The Russian Armed Forces hit oil refining and energy facilities used in the interests of the Armed Forces of Ukraine
